2605.21237.title: RePCM: Region-Specific and Phenotype-Adaptive Bi-Ventricular Cardiac Motion Synthesis
2605.21237.paper_summary: Cardiac motion over a cardiac cycle is crucial for quantifying regional function and is strongly affected by cardiovascular diseases. Since temporally dense mesh sequences are difficult to obtain in practice, we focus on leveraging the more accessible end-diastolic frame to infer a full-cycle sequence. Due to strong regional and disease-specific differences, traditional methods often oversmooth the data by relying on generative models that are optimized for global patterns. To address this problem, we propose Region-Aware and Phenotype-Adaptive Bi-Ventricular Cardiac Motion Synthesis (RePCM) for single frame Bi-ventricular mesh motion completion. In Stage I, a reconstruction network learns vertex wise motion descriptors and clustering yields a data driven functional partition, providing an explicit motion derived region structure. In Stage II, a Region-Specific Injection Module enforces masked, synchronized region exchange within a conditional VAE, preserving localized specific dynamics and restricting cross-region mixing. A Phenotype-Adaptive Mixture-of-Experts prior conditioned on ED shape uses anatomy-guided cues to model latent motion trends and capture inter-disease variability. Experiments on three datasets covering different cardiovascular diseases show consistent gains in geometric and functional metrics and improved preservation of region specific dynamics.
2605.21237.paper_summary_zh: 心臟在一個心臟週期內的運動對於量化區域功能至關重要，並且受到心血管疾病的強烈影響。由於在實際操作中難以獲得時間密集的網格序列，我們專注於利用更易獲得的舒張末期影像來推斷完整的週期序列。由於存在強烈的區域性和疾病特異性差異，傳統方法通常通過依賴針對全局模式優化的生成模型來過度平滑數據。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了區域感知和表型自適應雙心室心臟運動合成（RePCM），用於單幀雙心室網格運動的補全。在第一階段，重建網絡學習頂點級運動描述符，並通過聚類產生數據驅動的功能劃分，提供明確的運動衍生區域結構。在第二階段，區域特定注入模塊在條件變分自編碼器內強制執行掩蔽的、同步的區域交換，保留局部特定動態並限制跨區域混合。基於舒張末期形狀的表型自適應專家混合先驗使用解剖引導的線索來建模潛在運動趨勢並捕捉疾病間的變異性。在涵蓋不同心血管疾病的三個數據集上的實驗顯示，在幾何和功能指標上持續獲得增益，並改善了區域特定動態的保留。
2605.21237.author: Xuan Yang et.al.
2605.21237.authors: Xuan Yang, Xiaohan Yuan, Hao Li, Lingyu Chen, Yanan Liu, Lei Li
